gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用幽默包裹悲伤的成人爱情童话，语音留言里的灵魂碰撞比任何特效都动人。
gems.whyWatchEn: A bittersweet romantic comedy where a voicemail mix-up leads to genuine emotional connection, proving love can bloom in the most accidental ways.
gems.audience: 喜欢《电子情书》式现代浪漫、对轻松又走心故事有偏好的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of modern rom-coms like 'You've Got Mail' who enjoy heartfelt yet lighthearted storytelling.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 怀旧与创新并存，用玩具的视角叩问数字时代童年消失的隐痛。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly poignant reflection on childhood in the digital age, wrapped in familiar Pixar charm and witty new characters.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》老粉、关注儿童屏幕时间问题的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Toy Story fans and parents concerned about children's screen time and digital play.
